summary: Completed testing of tracking number feature for Printsout e-commerce app. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests verified: Shipping dialog appears when changing status to 'shipped', carrier dropdown has all 5 options (PostNord, DHL, Bring, DB Schenker, UPS), tracking number input works, confirm/cancel buttons work correctly, tracking info is displayed in order details with clickable tracking link, toast message shows 'leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund' after shipping.

minor.issue: API key may be expired in preview environment - email function is called but may fail to send

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 227-232: AdminOrderUpdate model correctly includes tracking_number and tracking_carrier fields
server.py line 1441-1444: Correctly sends shipping notification with tracking info when status changes to 'shipped' or 'skickad'
email_service.py line 157-248: build_shipping_notification_html() correctly includes tracking number with carrier-specific tracking URL
email_service.py line 181-188: carrier_urls mapping correctly maps all 5 carriers to their tracking URLs
OrderDetailPanel.js line 9-15: CARRIERS object correctly maps carrier keys to names and tracking URL functions
OrderDetailPanel.js line 45-58: handleStatusChange correctly shows shipping dialog when status is 'shipped'
OrderDetailPanel.js line 129-147: Tracking info display with carrier name and clickable tracking link works correctly
AdminOrders.js line 71-88: updateOrderStatus correctly sends tracking_number and tracking_carrier to backend

test_credentials.note: Admin requires 2FA with TOTP code from Microsoft Authenticator or pyotp

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tracking number feature fully implemented and tested. When admin changes order status to 'Skickad' (shipped): (1) Shipping dialog appears with carrier dropdown (PostNord, DHL, Bring, DB Schenker, UPS) and tracking number input, (2) Clicking 'Bekräfta leverans' sends status + tracking_number + tracking_carrier to backend, (3) Backend saves tracking info to order and includes it in shipping email, (4) Frontend shows toast 'Orderstatus uppdaterad — leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund', (5) Tracking info is displayed in order detail panel with clickable tracking link. The Resend API key may be expired in preview environment - this is expected.

Backend API.Tracking persistence: ✓ Tracking info saved to MongoDB order document
Backend API.All carriers accepted: ✓ postnord, dhl, bring, schenker, ups all work
Backend API.Shipping without tracking: ✓ Status can be changed to shipped without tracking number

Frontend UI.Shipping dialog trigger: ✓ Dialog appears when changing status to 'shipped'
Frontend UI.Carrier dropdown: ✓ Shows PostNord, DHL, Bring, DB Schenker, UPS options
Frontend UI.Toast message: ✓ Shows 'leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund' after shipping
Frontend UI.Tracking display: ✓ Shows carrier name, tracking number, and clickable tracking link

frontend_ui_tests.Order selection: ✓ Order detail panel shows on selection
frontend_ui_tests.Status dropdown: ✓ Shows Väntande, Behandlas, Skickad, Slutförd options
frontend_ui_tests.Confirm button: ✓ Sends data and shows success toast
frontend_ui_tests.Tracking info display: ✓ Shows carrier, number, and tracking link
